overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront in the game Cyberpunk 2077. The character descends wide concrete stairs and walks along a rain-slicked promenade lined with neon signs, palm trees, and towering glass skyscrapers, eventually entering a purple-lit underpass with dense pedestrian activity.

events.description: male pedestrian in brown jacket passes close to camera on the right, temporarily blocking view
character reaches bottom of stairs and transitions to flat waterfront walkway

agents.ego_description: walking down a wide set of concrete stairs toward the waterfront, passing pedestrians moving in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: male pedestrian in brown jacket walking up the stairs, passes close to camera
pedestrian in dark clothing standing near the railing at the bottom of the stairs

entered.detail: broad set of concrete stairs leading down to the waterfront promenade
orange-painted metal handrail along the left side of the stairs
tall glass and steel towers with illuminated windows dominating the skyline
tall palm trees lining the right side of the promenade
tall cylindrical light fixtures emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The character descends a wide concrete staircase toward a futuristic waterfront promenade at night. Neon billboards and glass skyscrapers illuminate the hazy sky while palm trees line the path. A pedestrian passes close to the camera as the character reaches the bottom of the stairs and transitions to the flat promenade walkway.

events.description: large cylindrical digital billboard with rotating advertisements becomes prominent on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-slicked waterfront promenade past tiered concrete seating areas

entered.detail: flat concrete walkway along the water's edge with wet reflective surfaces
stepped concrete bleachers or seating areas along the left side of the walkway
tall cylindrical structure wrapped with digital advertisements displaying colorful graphics
elevated concrete bridge or overpass spanning across the walkway ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open waterfront promenade with tiered concrete seating on the left and a body of water on the right. A large cylindrical digital billboard displays advertisements while the character approaches a concrete overpass in the distance. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights from the surrounding skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass with purple neon lighting

events.description: approaching overpass with intense purple neon lighting, atmosphere becomes enclosed and sheltered
entering the underpass area bathed in purple neon light from advertisement screens

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering the neon-lit underpass, passing groups of pedestrians gathered near the entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward camera under the overpass
person sitting on a concrete bench near the waterfront railing

entered.detail: intense purple and pink neon illumination from digital screens and light fixtures under the overpass
concrete and metal benches positioned along the right side of the walkway
large illuminated screen displaying purple and pink neon advertisements on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered underpass bathed in vibrant purple neon light. The concrete overpass looms overhead while digital advertisement screens cast colorful reflections on the wet ground. More pedestrians are visible in this area, including someone sitting on a bench to the right and others walking through the underpass. The atmosphere shifts from open waterfront to an enclosed, neon-lit urban space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, neon-lit waterfront descent into a dense, purple-hued urban underpass. It begins as the character descends a wide concrete staircase toward a futuristic promenade, passing a pedestrian while glass skyscrapers and palm trees frame the hazy night sky. As the character reaches the flat walkway, the scene opens up to a rain-slicked promenade featuring tiered concrete seating and a large cylindrical digital billboard reflecting off the wet pavement. The camera then advances toward a looming concrete overpass, transitioning from the open air of the waterfront into a semi-covered space. Finally, the environment shifts into a vibrant purple-lit underpass where digital screens cast colorful glows over a crowd of pedestrians and figures resting on benches.
